generally possible for CCW to identify a unique provider using an NPI, DEA number, and/or UPIN 
number. 

This variable is populated for every PDE that could be linked to a provider in the HCIdea database for 
that year. CCW_PRSCRBR_ID has a negative value when a conclusive link could not be found between 
the prescriber identification number in the source PDE data and the HCIdea database.
